name: Pool chair Lounge Green - Sun Squad™: PVC Water Float, 1 Person Capacity, No Pump Included
description:
Dive into relaxation with this vibrant pool chair lounge from sun squad. Crafted from durable PVC, it's perfect for those lazy summer days by the pool. Designed for ages 14 and up, it comfortably supports up to 220 pounds. Its bright green hue adds a splash of color to your poolside setup. Just remember to grab an air pump, as it's not included. Ideal for solo lounging, it's a summer essential.

Sun Squad™: Ready for fun.
